fail_condition: custom forces force the holdout answer or use coordinate truth before sealing

mappings.custom_force_term: weak attractive bias between predicted coarse regions
mappings.guard: bias may be compared with unbiased baseline; it must not encode holdout coordinates

mappings.custom_force_term: penalty against over-collapse for high-disorder regions
mappings.guard: does not force a target fold
partner context must come from sealed operator grammar

mappings.custom_force_term: two-state basin potential with context-dependent weights
mappings.guard: must preserve competing basins rather than average them
membrane field cannot replace post-seal validation

mappings.custom_force_term: routing/state-weight observable outside atomistic force field core
mappings.guard: quality-control readout remains an observable, not a coordinate restraint
host-interface coordinates remain holdout-only before sealing

mappings.custom_force_term: coarse cysteine-pair proximity bias for secretory disulfide grammar
mappings.guard: does not encode native disulfide geometry; only compares biased versus unbiased sealed observables

mappings.custom_force_term: secretory redox-state observable bias outside atomistic chemistry
mappings.guard: redox state is reported as a coarse proxy, not a quantum or force-field disulfide formation claim

mappings.custom_force_term: coarse N-terminal secretory-routing bias for cleavable signal peptide grammar
mappings.guard: does not encode a native membrane path; compares signal-routing observables against matched TM decoys

mappings.custom_force_term: coarse competing membrane-insertion observable for signal/TM boundary checks
mappings.guard: true TM insertion remains a falsifier for signal-peptide acceptance, not a hidden label

mappings.custom_force_term: coarse cleavage-context observable for signal peptidase routing
mappings.guard: cleavage context must come from sealed non-coordinate evidence and matched controls
secretory route is a language observable unless independent physical holdouts earn a physical claim

mappings.custom_force_term: coarse heptad/register alignment observable derived from sealed sequence and evidence
mappings.guard: register bias is compared with heptad-shuffled controls and must not encode native coordinates
ordinary helix bundle and generic assembly controls must fail the coiled-coil claim

mappings.custom_force_term: coarse partner-register observable for coiled-coil cores
mappings.guard: partner-copy context remains sealed non-coordinate evidence
accepted rows must beat register-shift controls without static observable cutoffs
repeat order controls must reduce phase support without native contact leakage
generic multidomain and beta controls remain falsifiers
local closure cannot by itself claim a physical fold
global stack is scored by paired controls, not fixed thresholds
boundary masking should expose conflict instead of forcing acceptance

mappings.custom_force_term: coarse threading-loop observable for knot/slipknot grammar
mappings.guard: explicit non-coordinate topology context is required; sequence alone cannot validate the knot
topology-masked controls must fail before any accepted knot grammar is supported
long-range order shuffles are paired falsifiers
intermediate support is a language observable, not an atomistic path claim
accepted knot rows must beat unknotted topology controls and physical claims stay blocked

pass_condition: future executed bridge must improve sealed observables over unbiased baseline without encoding the answer
